name: Beggar's Purse
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat 4 inches of the peanut oil to 375 degrees F in a deep-fat fryer or large Dutch oven.
2. Heat the olive oil in a saute pan over medium heat. Cook the mushrooms until they are quite soft and give up their liquid, about 5 minutes. Season the mushrooms with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Stir in the tarragon and set aside to cool.
4. Working with one wonton wrapper at a time, place 1 teaspoon of sauteed mushrooms in the center of each wrapper.
5. Wet the edges of the wrapper with water and gather the edges together to form a "purse". Make sure not to trap any air inside.
6. Fry the wonton purses, 2 to 3 at a time, for 3-5 minutes, until they begin to brown and bob to the top.
7. Drain on a cooling rack covered with paper towels.
8. Tie each purse with a strand of chives.
